title: Operate task failure and SLA notifications
description: Route task failures and SLA misses to actionable alerts with run context so incidents are caught, not buried in logs.
body: Use when a pipeline's failures must be noticed and acted on. Do not depend on engineers scanning the UI — failures buried among many runs go unseen for hours. Actions: configure on-failure and on-SLA-miss callbacks to send alerts including the DAG, task, execution date, and log link; suppress noise from expected retries so only final failures page. Validation signals include an alert delivered on a seeded final failure with full context and no alert on a transient retry that later succeeded. Risk boundary: missed failure alerts let stale or wrong data flow downstream; if a critical task lacks failure notification, treat it as an operational gap and escalate to wire it before relying on the pipeline.
